# mxroute_reseller_users (Data Source)

Lists reseller usernames on the MXroute account. Requires a reseller account. For one user's details, use the `mxroute_reseller_user` resource.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mxroute_reseller_users" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Data source identifier — a fixed value for this account-wide list.
- `usernames` (List of String) The usernames of all reseller-managed users.
